message:
perf: migrate Cx, actor, GenServer, and runtime state from std RwLock to parking_lot

Continue the parking_lot lock migration into the core context and
actor subsystems — the highest-traffic lock sites in the runtime.

Cx (capability context):
- Migrate Cx.inner and Cx.observability from Arc<std::sync::RwLock<..>>
  to Arc<parking_lot::RwLock<..>>, removing ~30 .expect("lock poisoned")
  calls across region_id(), task_id(), budget(), is_cancel_requested(),
  checkpoint(), checkpoint_with(), masked(), cancel_with(), cancel_fast(),
  cancel_reason(), root_cancel_cause(), cancelled_by(), any_cause_is(),
  set_cancel_reason(), set_cancel_requested(), set_cancel_internal(),
  set_request_id(), log(), set_diagnostic_context(), set_log_collector(),
  set_trace_buffer(), child_observability(), and the MaskGuard drop impl
- from_inner() and new_with_options() updated to construct parking_lot
  RwLock instances

Actor and GenServer handles:
- ActorHandle.inner and GenServerHandle.inner: Weak<std::sync::RwLock>
  → Weak<parking_lot::RwLock>
- stop() and abort() methods: collapse if-let-Ok pattern into direct
  lock() + field assignment
- PhaseBudgetGuard: migrate inner field, remove Ok-matching in Drop
- AsyncMaskGuard: migrate inner field, simplify Drop from if-let-Ok
  to direct write().mask_depth decrement

Runtime internals:
- MaskedFinalizer: migrate cx_inner from std RwLock, remove
  .expect("lock poisoned") in enter(), simplify leave() Drop logic
- RuntimeState::complete_task: simplify cancel_waker cleanup from
  if-let-Ok to direct write()
- record/task.rs: migrate from std RwLock, update test assertions
  from .read().unwrap() to .read()
- runtime/task_handle.rs: migrate from std RwLock, update tests
- runtime/scheduler/three_lane.rs: add parking_lot::RwLock import,
  remove std::sync::RwLock from use list

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
